ModMetaData.name: Zed Zed Zed
ModMetaData.author: Johnny Berry / Vyberware
ModMetaData.description:
Zed Zed Zed is a RimWorld zombie mod built around steady pressure, rough nights, and colonies that never feel fully safe.
The outbreak mixes edge trickles, huddled packs, base pushes, ground bursts, grave events, moon attacks, and full herd crossings. The horde includes biters, bone biters, runts, boomers, sick zombies, drowned, brutes, grabbers, and passive lurkers.
The mod also adds zombie infection, bile med kits, bile surgery, zombie resources, rotten leather furniture and floors, custom naming, debug tools, and a small HUD that shows current danger on your home map.
Built for RimWorld 1.6. Requires Harmony.
